hypothesis: Branched and cross-linked polyamine sorbents discovered through a multi-fidelity Bayesian optimization framework that couples cheap packing-density surrogates with accurate MD-GCMC simulations will exhibit at least a 25% higher CO2 adsorption capacity than the best linear polyamine sorbents found by single-fidelity BO under ambient DAC conditions (0.4 mbar CO2, 298 K, ~50% RH).
